name: Living Security Platform
description: AI-native human risk management platform designed to secure hybrid workforce of humans and AI agents. Uses Livvy AI engine for behavioral risk intelligence, remediation automation, and AI agent monitoring.
notes: GA launch March 24, 2026. Purpose-built for managing both human and AI agent risk. Livvy AI engine powers behavioral analysis. Early adopters report 90%+ satisfaction and significant reduction in high-risk users. Strong compliance posture (Forrester Leader Q3 2024).
